resource.name: Err.Timeout
resource.object: A timeout occured during scope data collection. Not enough data was collected.

resource.name: Err.NoPreSampleData
resource.object: Presample data could not be collected due to missing start sensor signals.

resource.name: Err.WrongDeviceMode
resource.object: Failed to start scope data collection. Device is not running in mode 90-93

resource.name: Err.ScopeCollectionBusy
resource.object: Scope data collection is already busy. Please wait until finished...

resource.name: Err.NoDataFromDevice
resource.object: Not able to get data from device

resource.name: Err.DeviceInWrongMode
resource.object: The device is not running in mode 90-93. Static weight retrieval is not possible
